name: context-bridge-lab
description: Laboratório MCP de orquestração entre Claude Code CLI e Gemini CLI (Claude decide, Gemini executa, MCP registra).

scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run check
scripts.validate:windows: npm run format:check && npm run check:node
scripts.validate:linux: npm run format:check && npm run check:node && npm run check:sh
